title: A_Villager_NS
description: Annoying Villager style resource pack Unmodified Sounds Version
body: This is an "Annoying Villager" themed resource pack, working for both PvP and survival modes. Low-placed flames won’t block your view in combat; it has redesigned textures for most weapons, tools, props and food that fit the theme. It makes your gameplay more comfortable.(Unmodified Sounds Version)
